evals.title: coding-agent-ui
evals.tagline: Build a local coding agent with a browser chat UI.
evals.description: Build an application I can run locally that runs a coding agent in the background with access to my computer (read/write files, execute shell commands), exposed via a chat interface in the browser.

solutions.summary: FastAPI + WebSocket backend running an Anthropic tool-use loop (bash, read/write/edit files, list_dir). Single-page vanilla JS chat UI streams tokens and tool calls live.

outcome.verdict: Builds and serves cleanly. Not yet evaluated end-to-end against the acceptance criteria.

solutions.notes: Run with `python -m ez_claw` after exporting ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

solutions.summary: FastAPI + WebSocket backend running an OpenAI Chat Completions tool-use loop with parallel function calling (bash, read/write/edit files, list_dir). Single-page vanilla JS chat UI streams assistant text and tool calls.

outcome.verdict: Builds and serves cleanly. Not yet evaluated end-to-end against the acceptance criteria.

solutions.notes: Run with `python -m cc2` after exporting OPENAI_API_KEY.

evals.title: gaps-get-filled
evals.tagline: Empirically test the gap-fill folklore on U.S. equities and make a case for what the result means.
evals.description: Build a backtesting sandbox + CLI that tests whether price gaps on stock charts get filled, on the S&P 500 over a 10-year window. Ship a self-contained HTML presentation that takes a position on what the result means — not just a dashboard.

solutions.summary: Python + pandas backtesting sandbox with strict-gap detection, an event-driven single-symbol backtester, and a static HTML presentation generator. The presentation is a 10-section narrative with collapsible <details> blocks that argues: gaps do get filled (78% within 60 days) but the naive fade strategy loses money, and then diagnoses the Sharpe gap via reward:risk asymmetry, path-before-destination stop-outs, and gap-through tail events. Streamlit dashboard also included for ad-hoc exploration.

outcome.verdict: Ships a precomputed 7-symbol / 10-year demo run and sample dashboard.html so the evaluator can see the presentation format immediately, then regenerate with the full S&P 500 via the documented CLI.

solutions.notes: Live demo (deployed): [./artifacts/gaps-get-filled/claude-code-opus-4-7-high.html](./artifacts/gaps-get-filled/claude-code-opus-4-7-high.html). In-repo copy at `results/runs/test_7sym/dashboard.html`. Regenerate any run's HTML with `python scripts/build_dashboard.py --run <name>`.
